metadata.subject: Applied Design, Skills and Technologies
metadata.description: Students develop advanced proficiency in business software applications, with emphasis on spreadsheet mastery, database management, and integration of business tools. This course prepares students for modern office environments where data management and digital productivity are essential.
metadata.general_description: Advanced business software including spreadsheets, databases, and integrated productivity tools for modern office environments.

big_ideas.statement: Business software applications integrate data management, analysis, and communication to enhance organizational efficiency
big_ideas.elaboration: Modern business depends on seamless integration of spreadsheets, databases, and communication tools to manage information and support decision-making.

big_ideas.statement: Advanced spreadsheet techniques transform raw data into meaningful insights and business intelligence
big_ideas.elaboration: Beyond basic formulas, advanced functions, pivot tables, and data visualization enable professionals to analyze complex datasets and communicate findings.

big_ideas.statement: Database management systems organize, secure, and retrieve organizational data efficiently and reliably
big_ideas.elaboration: Well-designed databases ensure data integrity, enable rapid queries, and support multiple users accessing information simultaneously.

big_ideas.statement: Digital collaboration tools connect team members and streamline workflow across geographic and organizational boundaries
big_ideas.elaboration: Cloud-based and integrated business applications enable real-time collaboration, version control, and seamless communication.

competencies.raw: Design spreadsheet models and tools that support business analysis and decision-making
i_can_statements: I can plan spreadsheet structure for optimal data organization and analysis
I can design financial models that forecast business scenarios
I can create dashboard templates for key performance indicator tracking
I can develop automated workflows within spreadsheet applications

competencies.raw: Design database structures that organize and protect organizational information
i_can_statements: I can plan database schemas with appropriate tables and relationships
I can design forms and queries to support user workflows
I can create reports that present database information effectively
I can implement security measures to protect sensitive data

competencies.raw: Design integrated business solutions using multiple software applications
i_can_statements: I can plan workflows that connect spreadsheets, databases, and communication tools
I can design data exchange processes between applications
I can create user interfaces that simplify complex processes
I can plan automation that reduces manual data entry

competencies.raw: Design presentations that communicate business information clearly and persuasively
i_can_statements: I can plan slide layouts that support audience understanding
I can design visualizations that highlight key data insights
I can structure presentations that flow logically and engage audiences
I can incorporate multimedia elements effectively

competencies.raw: Apply advanced spreadsheet functions and tools to analyze and manipulate business data
i_can_statements: I can use advanced functions including VLOOKUP, INDEX/MATCH, and array formulas
I can create pivot tables to summarize and analyze large datasets
I can use data validation and conditional formatting to enhance spreadsheets
I can apply what-if analysis and goal seek tools

competencies.raw: Apply database design principles to create and manage relational databases
i_can_statements: I can create tables with appropriate data types and constraints
I can establish relationships between tables using primary and foreign keys
I can write queries to retrieve, filter, and sort data
I can create forms and reports to present database information

competencies.raw: Apply business software to automate tasks and improve productivity
i_can_statements: I can use mail merge to create personalized documents
I can create macros to automate repetitive tasks
I can integrate data from multiple sources within applications
I can troubleshoot software issues and optimize performance

competencies.raw: Apply presentation techniques to communicate data insights effectively
i_can_statements: I can create professional presentations with consistent formatting
I can design charts and graphs that accurately represent data
I can add interactivity to presentations for audience engagement
I can present data with appropriate design principles and accessibility

competencies.raw: Use cloud-based business applications and collaboration tools effectively
i_can_statements: I can navigate cloud-based office suites and productivity tools
I can collaborate in real-time using shared documents and spreadsheets
I can manage file storage and version control in cloud environments
I can integrate cloud applications into business workflows

competencies.raw: Use emerging technologies to enhance business productivity and efficiency
i_can_statements: I can leverage artificial intelligence tools for data analysis
I can use mobile applications to access business data on the go
I can implement automation and workflow tools
I can evaluate new technologies for business applications

competencies.raw: Use security and data protection technologies appropriately
i_can_statements: I can implement password protection and encryption
I can manage user access and permissions
I can backup and recover critical business data
I can follow best practices for protecting sensitive information

competencies.raw: Use technology to streamline communication and document management
i_can_statements: I can organize and manage digital file systems effectively
I can use document management systems to control versions
I can leverage communication platforms for business collaboration
I can maintain digital records according to organizational standards

areas.name: Advanced Spreadsheet Techniques and Analysis
topics: Advanced formulas and nested function applications
Pivot tables and data aggregation techniques
Data validation and conditional formatting
Financial modeling and forecasting tools
Statistical analysis and trend analysis

areas.name: Database Design and Management
topics: Relational database concepts and normalization
Table creation and relationship establishment
Query design for data retrieval and manipulation
Form creation for user-friendly data entry
Report generation and data presentation

areas.name: Business Software Integration and Automation
topics: Integration of spreadsheets, databases, and applications
Macro creation and automation of repetitive tasks
Data import and export procedures
Workflow automation using business process tools
API integration and system connectivity

areas.name: Cloud-Based Collaboration and Emerging Technologies
topics: Cloud-based office suites and document collaboration
Real-time sharing and concurrent editing
Mobile productivity applications and remote work tools
Artificial intelligence and machine learning applications
Data security and access management in cloud environments
